caption: Three people are seated on chairs on a stage against a purple and pink background with neon lighting. On the left, a man with dark hair and a beard wears a white button-down shirt and dark trousers. In the center, a woman with blonde hair wears a black short-sleeved top and black trousers. On the right, a man with glasses wears a grey suit and a light-colored shirt. In front of the first man sits a large, white, blocky electronic device. To the right of the group, a logo containing the letters "SL" is partially visible. Across the sequence, the three individuals remain seated, maintaining similar postures while shifting slightly and blinking. The man on the left keeps his hands clasped in his lap, while the woman and the man in the suit sit with their hands resting on their legs. The overall scene remains static, capturing a moment of a panel discussion or presentation.
